title: Hyperliquid payments with Cypher
summary_title: CypherCard launches on Hyperliquid: bridging perps to real-world spending
summary_description: Cypher's founder discusses on-chain banking, instant card loading from HLP vaults, and Forex fee advantages for global users.

key_moments.label: Zerk introduces RecGang and why Cypher was needed on Hyperliquid
Cube explains Cypher's on-chain banking vision and perp-to-card workflow
Technical breakdown: simplifying off-ramp from perpetuals to Visa card
PBR requests auto-load feature from HLP vault deposits
Roadmap: merchant incentives token, DeFi integrations, co-branded cards
Forex education: avoiding predatory POS conversions, on-chain currency solutions
Metrics and growth strategy: 25-50 signups, focusing on product-market fit
